reviews.review_msg: Maitland is just an amazing person let alone professor. He constantly offers help, has clear guidelines for assignments and his exams were super clear! I was more focused on what his lectures talked about and I actually learned so much because he was so passionate and explains concepts well!! One of the best classes I have taken!!
Maitland is an amazing prof! He truly cares about his students, and all the marking criteria is straightforward! Would recommend!!

Maitland was a great prof! 3 hour lectures but he made them bearable. In-class activities for marks but basically just participation. He really encourages feedback, optional survey after every class for students to anonymously say what was unclear in the lecture. He is super clear about grading and truly wants his students to do well.
